title: Volcanic Ash Combat
description: Active volcanic vents spawn in the Nether and occasionally erupt, blanketing nearby areas with damaging ash particles that affect PvP visibility and deal tick damage.
body:
# Volcanic Ash Combat

Introduces volcanic hazards to Nether PvP encounters.

## Features

**Volcanic Vents**
- Spawn randomly across Nether wastes and basalt deltas biomes using marker entities
- Erupt every few minutes with a chance-based trigger system

**Ash Clouds**
- Dense particle effects that expand outward in a radius upon eruption
- Persist for 30-60 seconds before dissipating naturally
- Apply effects to players in the cloud:
  - Mining fatigue
  - Reduced visibility
  - Small amounts of fire damage over time

**Tactical Element**
- Creates dynamic environmental zones during PvP fights
- Enables positioning strategies: lure enemies into ash or use eruptions as cover for retreats

## Technical Details

- Uses scoreboard timers for eruption cycles
- Uses area effect clouds for damage zones
- Optimized for performance: only checks vent status every 20 ticks, limited to loaded chunks with efficient entity selectors

## Commands

- `/function volcanic_ash:force_eruption` - Trigger an eruption at the nearest vent
- `/function volcanic_ash:clear_all` - Remove all active ash clouds
